notes_for_human_reviewer: Ceiling submission. Identifies the critical path has shifted from WP-04 to WP-06/WP-07 because of the integration pattern change, names every activity on the current critical path, and explicitly notes WP-04/WP-05 are off the new critical path. Evidence-vs-assertion analysis is comprehensive: catches the Reyes step-up pattern, the WP-07 hours-inversion (with A. Singh's quote), the WP-03 obsolete-spec issue, AND proposes binary sub-task tracking as the corrective. All four dependency categories named with specific examples and follow-up actions. Buffer analysis goes beyond the snapshot: distinguishes recorded-consumption from silent-consumption, calls out the scenario the buffer cannot cover ('cannot absorb WP-04 slip AND WP-07 slip AND FCA AND WP-08'). Status narrative is the exemplar — five sentences naming slips, causes, downstream effect, end-date risk, AND specific actions. Closes with chapter's framing ('the sponsor was furious not at the slip but at the surprise') and explicit humility ('two things I am not certain on'). This is what every learner should produce.
